prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game system art, square illustration
Primary request: Seasonal Altar art for Vavarda, a weekly favor progression feature
Scene/background: elevated temple platform under a supernatural night sky, celestial rings, ritual lanterns, subtle storm haze
Subject: central altar monolith with circular favor sigils, hovering blessing fragments, elegant weekly ritual device
Style/medium: premium fantasy progression illustration, polished, atmospheric, suitable for a feature panel
Composition/framing: centered altar, square crop, balanced layout, visually rich but readable at small sizes
Lighting/mood: ceremonial, aspirational, premium reward energy, soft gold and violet interplay
Color palette: deep indigo, black stone, pale gold, violet glow, cool silver accents
Materials/textures: carved stone, polished metal, floating sigils, ether light
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no character, make it feel like a weekly ritual destination
